data.name: Darkness and Desire
data.detailed_description:
You're just a normal, everyday farm boy. You want to escape the day-to-day drudge of working on your parents farm, but you don't have the means to do so. For now, you pass the time by flirting, and bedding, the local village ladies. That includes your sister's best friend, Isabella. Overall, it's a peaceful existence!



But that isn't going to last long. Alora and Alorine, the two goddess-like sisters who oversee the lands of Euchora, are at odds over the future of the people. Alorine wants to control them, while Alora sees their role as one of a silent benefactor. When Alorine attacks, devastation is left in her wake.



But something awakens within you. Something you did not know was there, and now Alorine wants it for herself. Can you escape from her evil plans? Where is this all leading? What about those you care about?



Darkness and Desire is an Adult Visual Novel where you will guide the narrative to its conclusion. You choose who to interact with. You decide how the interactions will shape the story in an immersive and detailed fantasy world, surrounded by custom music and audio. Experience the story in your own way!
data.about_the_game:

data.short_description: You're in the prime of your life, chasing the village girls and enjoying peaceful days. But there is evil in the air. The peace is broken and you are thrown into a world of magic and mystery. Where will your story lead you?
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 德文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10, 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 950 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon or Intel
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 950 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 950 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required
